name: com.curationengine.unity-mcp-ce
displayName: MCP for Unity - Curation Engine Edition
description:
Unity MCP bridge enhanced for Curation Engine with Odin Inspector control surface extraction and natural language exhibition creation tools. Fork of CoplayDev/unity-mcp with CE-specific Builder support.

Based on: https://github.com/CoplayDev/unity-mcp

author.name: Curation Engine Team (Fork by Jeremy Roush)
